properties.name: Martin Baranek
properties.bio_excerpt: Born in 1930 in Starachowice, Poland. Put into the Starachowice Ghetto in 1941, then deported to Auschwitz-Birkenau, sent on a death march, and liberated at Gunskirchen in spring 1945. Reached Canada in 1949.

Martin spent time in Italy

emigrated to Canada in 1949
